body:
## Summary

Make `/v1/audio/speech` streaming requests default to SSE.

This implements Option A from #4612:

- `stream=True` now returns OpenAI-style `speech.audio.*` SSE events.
- `stream_format="sse"` continues to return SSE events.
- `stream_format="audio"` remains available as an explicit opt-in for raw PCM/WAV byte streaming.
- Non-streaming speech requests remain unchanged.
- Updated in-repo raw audio streaming consumers, docs, benchmarks, and e2e request configs to explicitly use `stream_format="audio"`.

## Motivation

SSE provides structured stream events, which makes it possible to carry stream-level metadata such as usage, done events, and error events. Raw audio byte streaming cannot represent this metadata cleanly.

Issue #4612 discusses the server-side default behavior for speech streaming format. This PR follows the selected Option A direction: make speech streaming default to SSE while keeping raw audio streaming available through an explicit `stream_format="audio"` request.

## Behavior

The updated behavior is:

| Request | Behavior |
|---|---|
| no `stream`, no `stream_format` | non-streaming audio response |
| `stream=True` | SSE streaming |
| `stream_format="sse"` | SSE streaming |
| `stream=True` + `stream_format="sse"` | SSE streaming |
| `stream_format="audio"` | raw audio streaming |
| `stream=True` + `stream_format="audio"` | raw audio streaming |

`word_timestamps=true` is still rejected for HTTP speech streaming, because word timestamp streaming is currently implemented by the WebSocket `/v1/audio/speech/stream` path.

## Notes

This intentionally changes the compatibility behavior introduced by #4490, where `stream=True` preferred raw audio. Raw audio streaming remains available through `stream_format="audio"`.

## Tests

Ran:

- `pre-commit run ruff-format --files ...` on the modified speech API, raw-streaming example/client, benchmark, helper, and test files
- `pre-commit run ruff-check --files ...` on the same modified Python files
- `git diff --check`
- `python -m py_compile ...` on the modified Python files

Not run:

- Full e2e tests. The e2e request configs were updated semantically to pass `stream_format="audio"` for raw audio streaming, but model/hardware-backed e2e validation was not run locally.
title: Make speech streaming default to SSE
